StrategyType:           RollingUpdate

RollingUpdateStrategy:  0 max unavailable, 1 max surge
Pod Template:
  Labels:       app=dd-in-house-mip-solver-node-master
                app.kubernetes.io/component=master
                app.kubernetes.io/name=dd-in-house-mip-solver-node
                app.kubernetes.io/part-of=des-distributed-solver
  Annotations:  kubectl.kubernetes.io/restartedAt: 2026-06-04T03:06:09Z
  Containers:
   solver:
    Image:           docker.io/library/rust:1.90-bookworm
    Port:            8117/TCP
    Host Port:       0/TCP
    SeccompProfile:  RuntimeDefault
    Command:
      /bin/bash
      -lc
    Args:
      set -euo pipefail
      export PATH=/usr/local/cargo/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin
      source_root=/opt/dd-next-1
      if [ -n "${MIP_SOLVER_CLUSTER_GIT_URL:-}" ]; then
        rm -rf /tmp/k8s-source
        if git clone --depth 1 --branch "${MIP_SOLVER_CLUSTER_GIT_REF:-dev}" "${MIP_SOLVER_CLUSTER_GIT_URL}" /tmp/k8s-source; then
          git -C /tmp/k8s-source config url.https://github.com/.insteadOf git@github.com:
          git -C /tmp/k8s-source config url.https://github.com/.insteadOf ssh://git@github.com/
          git -C /tmp/k8s-source submodule sync --recursive remote/deployments/mip-solver-node.rs remote/submodules/discrete-event-system.rs
          git -C /tmp/k8s-source submodule update --init --depth 1 remote/deployments/mip-solver-node.rs remote/submodules/discrete-event-system.rs
          source_root=/tmp/k8s-source
          echo "[dd-in-house-mip-solver-node] source: cloned ${MIP_SOLVER_CLUSTER_GIT_URL}@${MIP_SOLVER_CLUSTER_GIT_REF:-dev}"
        else
          echo "[dd-in-house-mip-solver-node] source clone failed; using mounted source at ${source_root}" >&2
        fi
      fi
      solver_src="${source_root}/remote/deployments/mip-solver-node.rs"
      if [ ! -f "${solver_src}/Cargo.toml" ]; then
        echo "solver source not found at ${solver_src}" >&2
        exit 1
      fi
      cd "${solver_src}"
      exec /usr/local/cargo/bin/cargo run --release --locked
      
    Limits:
      cpu:     4
      memory:  8Gi
    Requests:
      cpu:      250m
      memory:   1Gi
    Liveness:   http-get http://:http/healthz delay=0s timeout=5s period=30s #success=1 #failure=3
    Readiness:  http-get http://:http/readyz delay=0s timeout=3s period=5s #success=1 #failure=2
    Startup:    http-get http://:http/healthz delay=0s timeout=1s period=5s #success=1 #failure=180
    Environment:
      HOST:                          0.0.0.0
      PORT:                          8117
      HOME:                          /tmp
      CARGO_HOME:                    /tmp/cargo
      CARGO_TARGET_DIR:              /tmp/mip-solver-node-target
      CARGO_BUILD_JOBS:              1
      MIP_SOLVER_NODE_ROLE:          master
      NATS_URL:                      nats://dd-nats.messaging.svc.cluster.local:4222
      REDIS_URL:                     redis://dd-redis-cache.default.svc.cluster.local:6379/0
      MIP_SOLVER_REDIS_KEY_PREFIX:   dd:mip-solver
      RDS_DATABASE_URL:              <set to the key 'RDS_DATABASE_URL' in secret 'dd-mip-solver-node-secrets'>              Optional: true
      AGENT_TASKS_RDS_DATABASE_URL:  <set to the key 'AGENT_TASKS_RDS_DATABASE_URL' in secret 'dd-mip-solver-node-secrets'>  Optional: true
      MIP_SOLVER_PG_POOL_SIZE:       4
      MIP_SOLVER_CLUSTER_GIT_URL:    https://github.com/ORESoftware/k8s-cluster.git
      MIP_SOLVER_CLUSTER_GIT_REF:    dev
      MIP_SOLVER_LP_MAX_ITERS:       10000
      MIP_SOLVER_MAX_SUBPROBLEMS:    256
      MIP_SOLVER_SPLIT_DEPTH:        4
    Mounts:
      /opt/dd-next-1 from repo (ro)
      /tmp from tmp (rw)
  Volumes:
   repo:
    Type:          HostPath (bare host directory volume)
    Path:          /home/ec2-user/codes/dd/dd-next-1
    HostPathType:  Directory
   tmp:
    Type:          EmptyDir (a temporary directory that shares a pod's lifetime)
    Medium:        
    SizeLimit:     <unset>
  Node-Selectors:  <none>
  Tolerations:     <none>
